questions.question: Explain C++ Core Principles Part 8A and its primary use case in C++.
questions.answer: C++ Core Principles Part 8A provides a structured mechanism to handle core application logic cleanly.

questions.question: What are common mistakes developers make with C++ Core Principles Part 8A?
questions.answer: Common issues include scoping errors, unhandled boundary cases, and improper resource cleanup.

questions.question: How does the C++ runtime optimize C++ Core Principles Part 8A under the hood?
questions.answer: The runtime engine uses symbol tables, call stack frames, and bytecode optimization to run instructions efficiently.
